ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar May-09-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Apr-11-2018 Continued To May-09-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor and the Attorney to appear on May 9,2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the Petition for Final Petition or the Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-11-2016 Granted Per Written Order
